prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UPD-ELBGLGS-2PC-SML-PNK Product Type: LIP_BALM Brand (from catalog): KidFun Products Existing Title: 2pk Emoji Girls Lip Balm Gift Set Watermelon and Bubble Gum Flavors Makeup Description: Add some fruity fun to any outfit with the 2pk of Emoji Lip Balms.

This set comes with 2 different flavored lip balms - one watermelon and one bubble gum. Each lip balm features an iconic emoji - the "my lips are sealed" monkey and the sunglasses smiley. Young kids will love showing off their Emoji-themed lip balms at school, on field trips or during play dates. This is a great stocking stuffer or party favor gift idea.

Please Note: All merchandise listed for sale is officially licensed, 100% authentic for worldwide distribution Search Terms: kids cosmetics toys for girls lip balm gloss dress up make Features: - Licensed Emoji Lip Balm Set - Pink & Green - Flavors: Watermelon & Bubble Gum - Featuring the "My Lips Are Sealed" Monkey & Sunglasses Smiley - Size: .12 oz Each - Great Stocking Stuffer or Party Favor === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: KidFun Products 2-pk Emoji Lip Balm Pink

openai.item_name: KidFun Products 2-pk Emoji Lip Balm Gift Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Watermelon And Bubble Gum Flavors, Licensed Emoji Design, 12 Oz Each, Stocking Stuffer

openai.title_differentiation: Licensed Emoji Designs, Watermelon And Bubble Gum Flavors, Pink And Green, My Lips Are Sealed Monkey, Sunglasses Smiley, Stocking Stuffer
